programs.title: Formula 1 Racing
programs.desc: The Formula One World Championship resumes with the Belgian Grand Prix from Circuit de Spa-Francorchamps. Lando Norris won in Austria and the United Kingdom to pull within eight points of McLaren teammate and championship leader Oscar Piastri.

programs.title: 1981 in Review
programs.desc: Jones endures Vegas heat, battles to finish, and seizes F1 crown in a dramatic Caesars showdown.

programs.title: 1982 in Review
programs.desc: Rosberg seals title in searing Vegas heat as Alboreto stuns with maiden win in a wild desert showdown.

programs.title: Race in 30
programs.desc: Formula 1 is a sport like no other and the Formula 1 Channel is the ultimate destination to catch up on all the action from F1, F2, F3 and F1 Academy races throughout the season, including analysis, replays and documentaries.

programs.title: Race in 30
programs.desc: Gasly holds off Hamilton for P2 in an Interlagos thriller.
